sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78646" key="para/prisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παράπρῑσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, perh. <sense id="n78646.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swelling, inflammation</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg006:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.27</biblScope> </bibl> (leg. <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραπρέσβ-πρησις</orth>).</sense> </entryFree>
